revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:出雲乃伊波比神社]]
'''Izumo-no-Iwai Shrine''' (出雲乃伊波比神社, いづものいわいのかむやしろ, いずものいわいじんじゃ) refers to the name of a Shinto shrine.
* '''Izumo-no-Iwai Shrine''' - A small shrine listed under the ''Engishiki'' in {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|qid=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}} {{ill|Obusuma District|ja|男衾郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Obusuma District|1=Obusuma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11578175}}. There are two candidate shrines. * {{ill|Izumo-no-Iwai Shrine (Yorii Town)|ja|出雲乃伊波比神社 (寄居町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo-no-Iwai Shrine (Yorii Town)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Yorii, Saitama|en|Yorii, Saitama|qid=Q961604|lt=Yorii Town|1=Yorii, Saitama}}, {{ill|Ōsato District, Saitama|en|Ōsato District, Saitama|qid=Q1075196|lt=Ōsato District|1=Ōsato District, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}} (formerly Obusuma District). One of the candidate shrines. * {{ill|Izumo-no-Iwai Shrine (Kumagaya City)|ja|出雲乃伊波比神社 (熊谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo-no-Iwai Shrine (Kumagaya City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Kumagaya|en|Kumagaya|qid=Q41106|lt=Kumagaya City|1=Kumagaya}}, Saitama Prefecture (formerly Obusuma District). Another of the candidate shrines.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Musashi Province|qq=}} * {{ill|Iwai Shrine|ja|伊波比神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwai Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A small shrine listed under the ''Engishiki'' in {{ill|Yokomi District|ja|横見郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokomi District|1=Yokomi district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11543466}}, Musashi Province. Located in {{ill|Yoshimi, Saitama|en|Yoshimi, Saitama|qid=Q543313|lt=Yoshimi Town|1=Yoshimi, Saitama}}, {{ill|Hiki District, Saitama|en|Hiki District, Saitama|qid=Q1075201|lt=Hiki District|1=Hiki District, Saitama}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Izumo Iwai Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|出雲伊波比神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo Iwai Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}} - A small shrine listed under the ''Engishiki'' in {{ill|Iruma District, Saitama|en|Iruma District, Saitama|qid=Q1153801|lt=Iruma District|1=Iruma District, Saitama}}, Musashi Province. There are four candidate shrines.
{{disambiguation}}
